title: Give Orders (+CHA)
description: When you **command an ally to take a particular course of action in the face of danger**, roll +CHA:

outcomes.text: They take **+1 ongoing** as long as they're acting on your orders.
They take **+1 forward** to execute your orders.
Mark XP, and the GM makes a move.

title: Inspire (+CHA)
description: When you **give an encouraging speech to your allies before facing a known threat**, say your piece and roll +CHA:

submoves.title: Spending Hold
submoves.description: When **your allies face the threat**, you may spend your hold, 1-for-1, to grant a friend or follower one of these tags:

bullets: **Fearless**: they stand fast and remain stable when they would otherwise hesitate, falter, or flee
**Invincible**: they ignore all damage from a single damage roll that would otherwise reduce them to 0 HP
**Vengeful**: they take **+1 ongoing** against the threat, as soon as you are incapacitated by it (maximum of +1 ongoing per character)

submoves.title: Note
submoves.description: You may spend hold for this move even after you're incapacitated or have passed through Death's Black Gates.

title: Bring 'Em Back Alive
description: When you **return to civilization after a dangerous expedition**, and everyone who left with you survives intact, each of your followers gains 1 Loyalty (maximum of +3), your reputation in the area improves, and you gain 1 XP.

title: Mourn the Dead (+CHA)
description: When you **ensure the last rites of a fallen comrade are conducted in a manner befitting their station and accomplishments**, say some kind words about them and roll +CHA:

outcomes.text: Each follower present gains 1 Loyalty (maximum of +3).
One follower of the GM's choice gains 1 Loyalty (maximum of +3).
Mark XP, and the GM makes a move.
